## Runtime.Session.MoldedBonBonEditingSession.analyzeMoldChange() method

Analyzes impact of changing to a new mold. Returns analysis for user review before confirmation.

**Signature:**

```typescript
analyzeMoldChange(moldId: MoldId): Result<IMoldChangeAnalysis>;
```
